user.title: Native MCP for Home Assistant
user.description: Mounts an MCP endpoint at /api/hass_mcp using your Home Assistant long-lived access tokens for authentication.

data.allow_write: Allow write tools (call_service, set_state, registry updates, config-entry mutations)
data.allow_destructive: Allow destructive tools (delete state, remove entries, registry delete)
data.allow_fire_event: Allow firing arbitrary events on the event bus
data.rate_limit_per_minute: Max MCP requests per minute per token (0 = unlimited)

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Native MCP for Home Assistant instance is supported.

init.title: Native MCP for Home Assistant options

data.rate_limit_per_minute: Max requests per minute per token (0 = unlimited)
